author: @calebomoro8227
comment_text: U are bad at stealth... U see those arrows that changes colour they are called line of sight most stealth games uses it. It can change from white to yellow then red... The time interval between them is what you should be taking advantage of for instance if you want to run to another cover and it is in the line of sight of the enemy u can run to it even if the arrow shows he is seeing you as long it hasn't turned yellow continue running to the next cover.... If it turns yellow hide immediately cause the guard will suspect something and check the perimeter you can avoid it by hiding in a new location and STAY PUT (cause I have noticed u don't know how to stay put if crouching for minutes let you understand the guards pattern or observe the area DO IT don't stand at every interval and panic) if they is no new location to hide... Hide in the same location he saw you but position yourself towards him ( in a slant manner is best if you want to go around him) when he comes close the game will show a prompt to assassinate him use that prompt don't charge at him like an idiot you are JAMES BOND not Rambo.... If the line of sight turns red it means they have lock on to you... The first thing you should do is run to an isolated location naturally the enemy will follow you then take him out in that isolated location if you are fast enough and position yourself properly you can assassinate him but if he is the type of enemy that calls for reinforcement or the mission says don't ring the alarm in most games even if they see you u have some seconds to take him out before he rings the Alarm.... HOPE YOU GET TO SEE THIS COMMENT

author: @nacerrrr5615
comment_text:
yo Nick, here are the setting and what they do in-game:
ABS - brakes don't lock instantly - keep on
traction control - the wheels don't lose traction BUT the car gets weaker because it kills the brute power of the engine - keep on in the beginning but try playing with it off on offline races to learn how to control the car without it.
stability control - automatically applies braking to prevent the car from slipping out, also kills your speed - keep off if possible, just remember to brake before the corners and you r good
launch control - helps launching the car - ok to keep on
steering - standard helps when using a controles, keep it on standard

author: @ondrej1893
comment_text: Efootball is miles ahead in gameplay but sadly Konami caters to casuals and bring stuff nobody asked for like Smart Assist. Filter is coming though. Even without SA there are now too many handholding assistants in the game, like pass assist level 1. Otherwise they also put in more ShowTime skills tkat kinda break the simulation game - like Blitz Curl, Long Reach Tackle…At least they balance it over time to be less spammable. Honestly all this is fine. If they implement proper Smart Assist filter, then the main problem will be connection/servers, as that is most often the thing that breaks your play. This game would really benefit from smoothness of let’s say Fornite. Where you never even see lag or think about connection. If you have connection, you can tiki-taka anyone. If you don’t, “meta” long ball counter 5 at the back team who spam “Capello-ball” will likely beat you. Those games often feel kept tightly in the automated corridor. Smart Assist, auto-clearance, auto-linkup play long ball etc. They abuse big player models like Vieira, Gullit to power through in the game.

author: @IhorIvkov
comment_text:
It’s interesting that now you and other streamers are going to blame everything except admitting that you simply played worse than your opponent in a certain match.

Think about it — one way or another, the game already has smart assist built into it. You’re not capable of making perfectly accurate passes and shots without AI assistance. That’s the foundation of games like EFootball. This isn’t Counter-Strike or other shooters where you manually aim and shoot someone in the head.

In EFootball, AI helps you hit the target anyway.

I tested the game both with Smart Assist enabled and disabled. And personally, I think it actually gets in the way more than it helps.

The people you and other streamers were facing with Smart Assist turned on are simply really good at EFootball. That’s why your losses happen… IMO.

author: @Marinho10
comment_text:
My GOAT is back. Hope you are feeling better. I mean you're not a weak kid so of course I'm sure you'll be healthy in no time!
Anyway, SA bad. Filter good. Now they only need to also start toning down AI defending, because it's still crazy to me that an opponent can put the controller down and the AI can still do soo much, especially inside the box.
Edit: As for the divisions. Konami goes from highest division you achieved. So if you reached div 1 you can never go lower than div 3, if your highest division was 2 then you can never go lower than 4, and so on. even if you don't play for one or more new seasons.
Edit 2: That last guy was not using SA. The best way to tell if someone is using SA is to look at the shot and pass bar. If it goes from 0 to, for example, 50% automatically then they are using SA. author: @Anonymous_web
comment_text: All the videos and social media posts about eFootball criticize assists. Assists (shooting, passing, dribbling, automatic substitution, cursor, attack and defense levels, sub-tactics, offside line) and intelligent assists, automaticity (the ball follows the player, making it impossible to pass directly to the opponent) and assisted gameplay (you press the button and the AI ​​tries to correct the action), all of this interferes with gameplay and you can't know your true level or anyone else's because you don't have total control over anything. The funny thing is that those who have been playing this game for years don't see this as if it didn't exist and only have eyes to complain about missed passes from 5 meters, balls hitting the post, etc.

author: @C0CKROACH_WHITE
comment_text:
I'm in the top 100 at my highest rank. 
I consistently have a rating of over 2000. 
Please, listen to me, "The Noob Nick."😘

First of all, you don't fully understand the stats, playstyle, and skills. 
You need to grasp those things first. 

Why do you use Puskás, who has no stamina, for 90 minutes? 😟
You don't understand that his stats decrease when his stamina decreases.

Next, your shooting is not good. 
Shoot with accurate control. 
Get past the opposing defender in the penalty area and shoot calmly.

Third, use super cancels more. 
I previously taught you to learn "Tess-cancel," but I can see you find it difficult and deliberately avoid it.🤭
 Don't push yourself too hard, "The noob Nick." 

However, make more use of super cancels and kick fakes. 
You used them twice in this video and created some good scenes. 👏👏

Super Cancels correct a player's posture. 
In this game, a player's posture is crucial when passing or shooting. 
Having the correct posture increases the success rate. 
Try to use Super Cancels more often.

Did you notice? 
When you do a shot fake, the opposing defender's AI will fall for it. 🤩
This is when you can dribble past the defender and take a shot. 
You should also learn “the shot-cancel-dash”. 
The shot cancel dash is a technique that allows you to accelerate and prevent the opposing defender from catching up to you. 
There's still more to say, but let's leave it at that for today.
Good luck 🤞
